Name: Readers for the visually impaired using Raspberry
Description: This prototype that we have implemented here is used by visually impaired people to hear the data content present in any of the documents through an audio format that is developed on the Raspberry Pi processor board. The mechanism that we used for the implementation of character recognition (OCR) technology is used for the identification of data text represent in any of the documents. The OCR process is done using online and offline methods. It converts images of documents that have been captured through the camera module and will convert that data text into machine-encoded text. These recognized and enhanced texts will be changed into an audio format. Raspberry Pi is used to translate printed documents into data files using the Tesseract library and Python programming.
